meta.name: copilot-thought-logging
meta.title: Copilot Thought Logging Skill
meta.description: See process Copilot is following where you can edit this to reshape the interaction or save when follow up may be needed Triggers on: **

original_definition.skill_description: See process Copilot is following where you can edit this to reshape the interaction or save when follow up may be needed Triggers on: **

actions.name: Generate an action plan into the `\Copilot-Processing.md` fi
actions.description: Generate an action plan into the `\Copilot-Processing.md` file.

actions.name: Generate detailed and granular task specific action items to
actions.description: Generate detailed and granular task specific action items to be used for tracking each action plan item with todo/complete status in the file `\Copilo

actions.name: Execute action items from the action plan in logical groupin
actions.description: Execute action items from the action plan in logical groupings/phases

actions.name: Update file `\Copilot-Processing.md` and mark the action ite
actions.description: Update file `\Copilot-Processing.md` and mark the action item(s) as complete in the tracking.

actions.name: When a phase is complete keep mental note of this that the s
actions.description: When a phase is complete keep mental note of this that the specific phase from `\Copilot-Processing.md` is done and does not need to be repeated.

actions.name: Execute only when ALL actions complete
actions.description: Execute only when ALL actions complete

actions.name: Remind user to review the summary and confirm completion of
actions.description: Remind user to review the summary and confirm completion of the process then to remove the file when done so it is not added to the repository.

actions.name: If you catch yourself about to skip a phase, STOP and go bac
actions.description: If you catch yourself about to skip a phase, STOP and go back to the correct phase

actions.name: If you catch yourself combining phases, STOP and perform onl
actions.description: If you catch yourself combining phases, STOP and perform only the current phase

rules.description: You must review these instructions in full before executing any steps to understand the full instructions guidelines.
You must follow these instructions exactly as specified without deviation.
Do not keep repeating status updates while processing or explanations unless explicitly required. This is bad and will flood Copilot session context.
Phases must be executed one at a time and in the exact order specified.
Ensure tasks are granular enough to be executed one at a time
NEVER write "# Phase X" headers in responses
NEVER repeat the word "Phase" in output unless explicitly required
NEVER provide explanations beyond the exact text specified
NEVER combine multiple phases in one response

directives.description: NO phase announcements (no "# Phase X" headers in output)
Only output the exact text specified in phase instructions
Work silently without announcements until complete.
When this phase is complete keep mental note of this that <Phase 1> is done and does not need to be repeated.
Specific tasks for each action item in the action plan as a phase.
Repeat this pattern until all action items are complete
